design_system.name: Kinetic Flow
design_system.description: A high-energy, precision-focused design system for badminton analytics. It combines the raw power of a smash with the fluid grace of footwork. Dark mode default with neon accents.

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 rounded-full px-8 py-6 font-bold text-lg shadow-glow transition-all hover:scale-105 active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground hover:bg-secondary/90 rounded-full px-6 py-4 font-medium transition-all
buttons.outline: border-2 border-primary/20 text-primary hover:bg-primary/10 rounded-full px-6 py-4 font-medium transition-all

cards.base: bg-card border border-white/5 rounded-3xl p-6 shadow-lg hover:border-primary/20 transition-colors
cards.glass: bg-black/40 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/10 rounded-3xl p-6

inputs.base: bg-muted/50 border-transparent focus:border-primary/50 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary/20 rounded-xl h-12 px-4 transition-all placeholder:text-muted-foreground/50

home.layout: Hero section with full-screen video/image background, overlay text with glassmorphism. Feature grid below using bento layout.

analysis.layout: Split screen: Video player (left/top) + Real-time metrics (right/bottom).

history.layout: Masonry or Grid layout of past sessions.

universal_guidelines: Use 'rounded-full' for all primary actions and tags.
Use 'rounded-3xl' for all major containers (cards, modals).
Avoid sharp 90-degree corners unless absolutely necessary for data tables.
Use 'Manrope' for all UI text and 'Teko' for large data numbers.
Primary color (Volt Green) should be used sparingly for accents and CTAs.
Always use 'backdrop-blur' for overlays to maintain context.
Ensure all interactive elements have a hover state (brightness-110 or scale-105).
Data visualization charts must use the defined chart colors and have rounded bar ends.
All interactive elements must have data-testid attributes.
